title: Skill observability event
description: Single SSOT for the skill observability event contract. Both obs-emit.mjs (runtime emit/validate) and the test suite consume this file, so the event shape has exactly one source of truth (no doc/code drift). Field names follow the OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic-convention SHAPE (agent.name->skill, operation.name->operation) without hard-coupling to the still-experimental spec. additionalProperties:false is the mechanical privacy guard: any unknown field (payload, diff, token, file path) fails validation and is never written.

schema_version.description: Event contract version. Bump on any breaking change; consumers gate on it.

session_id.description: Host session identifier. Opaque id only, never a path.

skill.description: Skill name (gen_ai.agent.name shape). 'unknown' when not derivable.

operation.description: Optional operation label (gen_ai.operation.name shape), e.g. invoke_agent / plan.

phase.description: Optional phase label, e.g. implement / ship / review.

name.description: Signal name (fixed-vocabulary), e.g. review.loop_iter / review.deep_to_quick_fallback / usage_guard.fail_open / hitl.rejected / loop.hit_cap. Required when event=signal.

value.description: Optional numeric counter for a signal.

reason.description: Optional short reason token (fixed-vocabulary). Must not carry free-form payload or identifying detail.

run_id.description: Optional correlation id grouping events of one skill run.

repo_hash.description: Optional hashed repo identifier (sha256 prefix). Never the raw repo name or path (privacy).
